name: Boston Chicken Cranberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium-to-low heat, use a rubber bowl scraper to stir together the jellied cranberry sauce, marmalade, and ground ginger until melted, about 6-8 minutes.
2. Add the sliced orange pieces and continue stirring often until the cranberries are no longer white and taste tender to the bite (not soft, but not too crisp).
3. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
4. Allow the sauce to cool to lukewarm, then refrigerate, covered, for up to 1 week. The sauce can also be frozen and used within 4 months.
